response.justification: Maria has strong full-stack engineering experience and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and leadership in customer-facing technical discovery — key requirements for this staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Proven full-stack proficiency in TypeScript/Node.js and cloud-native development (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Strong open-source contributions and technical mentorship through workshops and tools
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG, or LLM optimization — core required technologies
AI experience appears incidental rather than focused; insufficient evidence of 8+ years in production AI systems
Limited evidence of leading technical discovery sessions with enterprise stakeholders or managing AI-to-legacy integrations
